ogTitle: Wongan Hills vs Wongoondy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wongan Hills and Wongoondy.
heading: Wongan Hills vs Wongoondy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wongan Hills, Western Australia and Wongoondy, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wongoondy has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Wongan Hills (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wongan Hills or Wongoondy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wongan Hills has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Wongoondy scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wongan Hills scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Wongoondy scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wongan Hills or Wongoondy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wongoondy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
